name: Anna Berg
title: Senior Cloud & Data Engineer
source_detail: Onboarded from Anna's own CV upload.
consent_note: Consented to be put forward to clients (2026-06).
raw_text:
Anna Berg
Senior Cloud & Data Engineer — København
Danish (native), English (fluent)

SUMMARY
Senior engineer with 9 years building cloud data platforms and backend services for Nordic clients. Hands-on with Python, AWS and Kubernetes; comfortable owning a platform end to end and mentoring a small team.

SKILLS
Python, Django, FastAPI; AWS (ECS, EKS, S3, RDS, Lambda); Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform; PostgreSQL; Kafka, Airflow, Spark; CI/CD (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI).

EXPERIENCE
Lead Data Engineer — Danske Pension (contract, 2022–2024)
- Built a GDPR-compliant data platform on AWS (EKS + Terraform) ingesting 2M+ events/day.
- Cut nightly batch runtime from 6h to 40min by re-architecting the Airflow pipelines.
Senior Backend Engineer — Trustpilot (2018–2022)
- Owned the review-ingestion microservices (Python) serving 30M+ requests/day.
- Led the migration of 40 services to Kubernetes, reducing infra cost ~25%.

EDUCATION
MSc Computer Science — DTU (2015)

SELECTED OUTCOMES
- Danske Pension data platform delivered on time; passed the client's security review first pass.
- Trustpilot K8s migration: zero customer-facing downtime over a 9-month rollout.

name: Lars Holm
title: Solution Architect (.NET / Azure)
certifications: Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert
raw_text:
Lars Holm
Solution Architect (.NET / Azure) — Aarhus
Danish (native), English (fluent), German (working)

SUMMARY
14 years architecting enterprise systems for Danish public-sector and finance clients. Specialises in .NET on Azure, domain-driven microservices, and leading delivery teams through complex migrations.

SKILLS
C#, .NET 8, ASP.NET Core; Azure (AKS, Service Bus, Functions, App Service); microservices, Domain-Driven Design, event-driven architecture; SQL Server; REST/gRPC API design.

EXPERIENCE
Lead Architect — Udbetaling Danmark programme (subcontract, 2021–2024)
- Designed a case-handling platform on Azure (AKS) for a public-sector benefits programme.
- Led 3 squads (18 engineers); introduced DDD and contract testing across teams.
Solution Architect — Nykredit (2016–2021)
- Re-platformed a monolith into 25 .NET microservices on Azure; halved release lead time.

EDUCATION
MSc Software Engineering — Aarhus University (2010)

SELECTED OUTCOMES
- Udbetaling Danmark platform: passed a public-sector security audit; delivered phase 1 on schedule.
- Nykredit re-platform: release cadence from monthly to weekly within 12 months.

name: Mette Nielsen
title: Data Scientist / ML Engineer
raw_text:
Mette Nielsen
Data Scientist / ML Engineer — København
Danish (native), English (fluent)

SUMMARY
7 years delivering applied ML for Nordic clients, from model to production. Strong on NLP and MLOps; pragmatic about when not to use ML.

SKILLS
Python, pandas, scikit-learn, PyTorch; NLP (transformers, spaCy); MLOps (MLflow, SageMaker); AWS.

EXPERIENCE
ML Engineer — Saxo Bank (2020–2024)
- Built a document-classification service (NLP) cutting manual triage ~60%.
- Stood up the MLflow-based model registry + CI for retraining.
Data Scientist — KMD (2017–2020)
- Delivered demand-forecasting models for a municipal logistics client.

EDUCATION
MSc Data Science — KU (2017)

SELECTED OUTCOMES
- Saxo document-classification: 60% manual-triage reduction, in production 18+ months.
